description_long: This house is a multi-story residential building with a classic European architectural influence, featuring ornate decorative elements on the upper facade. The front showcases a prominent arched pediment with intricate trim, flanked by small dormer windows and a balcony with wrought iron railings. The structure is primarily rectangular with a complex, multi-faceted hip roof in a dark brown color. The facade is divided into several levels, each with large, symmetrically arranged windows and subtle color banding between floors. The rear and sides of the building are plain, with minimal window openings and no decorative features. The overall appearance suggests a stately, urban townhouse or apartment building, likely constructed from masonry and concrete.
description: A stately, multi-story urban house with ornate front facade, arched pediment, balconies, and a complex hip roof. The building features symmetrical windows and decorative trim, with plain sides and rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing ornate arched pediment, decorative trim, balconies, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Angled side-rear view highlighting the complex hip roof and plain, windowless rear facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, unadorned wall with no windows or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Side view showing the plain wall and the edge of the decorative front facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with steps, flanked by decorative columns and topped with an ornate arched pediment and balcony.
